narrative:
Butler County has 246,509 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 26.6% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -1.1% D−R vs -24.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
